name: On the Failure of Boundary-Seeking Distillation in Bottlenecked Generative Architectures
summary: arXiv:2607.15919v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation transfers the knowledge encoded in a teacher model to a student model without access to the original training data...
description: arXiv:2607.15919v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation transfers the knowledge encoded in a teacher model to a student model without access to the original training data. Prior work such as Contrastive Abductive Knowledge Extraction (CAKE) achieves this for classifiers by synthesizing samples near the teacher's decision boundary. In this work, we investigate whether...
author: Mohamed Amine Kina
